title: Minimum Time To Make Array Sum At Most X
description: At each second all nums1 values grow by nums2, then one chosen index may be reset to zero; return the minimum seconds to make the sum at most x, or -1. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: nums1: list[int], nums2: list[int], x: int. nums1 and nums2 have equal length 1..1000; all entries and x are nonnegative <=1000/1e6 respectively.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
